items.title: The future of Google is a search box that does everything
items.description: Last year, after watching Google's I/O keynote, I wrote that it felt like Google's future was Google googling. After watching this year's I/O keynote on Tuesday, I don't think Google just wants to google for you - I think it wants to do everything for you, all from a search box. Take the trusty Goog...

items.title: Demis Hassabis said this might be the ‘foothills of the singularity.’ What?

items.title: Plex is tripling the price of a lifetime pass to $750 after doubling it last year
items.description: I am dying to know how much money Plex is about to make the next six weeks charging people to stream their own video from their own homes. items.title: Google’s AI future demands trust — and your personal data
